svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Codex"> <diagram id="tocc-closed-loop" name="TOCC Closed Loop"> <mxGraphModel dx="-771" dy="-241" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="860" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0B1324;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Trace-Conditioned Operator-Card Controller (TOCC)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="760" x="70" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=15;fontColor=#475569;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Search steering layer for LLM-based heuristic evolution: choose card priors from trace evidence, then run bounded EOH." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="1040" x="70" y="76" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane_observe" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAF2F8;strokeColor=#7BA7C7;fontColor=#0B1324;fontStyle=1;fontSize=15;arcSize=8;" value="OBSERVE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="585" width="300" x="55" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane_control" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF4E8;strokeColor=#E07A2D;fontColor=#0B1324;fontStyle=1;fontSize=15;arcSize=8;" value="CONTROL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="585" width="440" x="380" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane_execute" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EEF7F2;strokeColor=#16845B;fontColor=#0B1324;fontStyle=1;fontSize=15;arcSize=8;" value="EXECUTE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="585" width="300" x="845" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane_memory" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F7FA;strokeColor=#94A3B8;fontColor=#0B1324;fontStyle=1;fontSize=15;arcSize=8;" value="MEMORY" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="585" width="270" x="1170" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="run_trace" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#7BA7C7;fontColor=#0B1324;fontSize=14;spacing=10;arcSize=12;" value="Run trace
objective, valid rate, cards, code family, failure reason" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="85" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="summary" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#7BA7C7;fontColor=#0B1324;fontSize=14;spacing=10;arcSize=12;" value="Auto summary
success_funnel.json
best code snippet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="240" x="85" y="515" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="diagnose" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#E07A2D;fontColor=#0B1324;fontSize=14;spacing=10;arcSize=12;" value="Diagnose bias
baseline_overlap, wrong_bias, valid_collapse, context_truncated" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="170" x="420" y="215" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="select_cards" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#E07A2D;fontColor=#0B1324;fontSize=14;spacing=10;arcSize=12;" value="Select cards
selected_card_ids
query, arm_config" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="170" x="620" y="215" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gatekeeper" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#E07A2D;fontColor=#0B1324;fontSize=14;spacing=10;arcSize=12;" value="Gatekeeper
card exists, problem prefix, prior decisions, no forbidden fields" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="115" width="210" x="500" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="manifest" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#16845B;fontColor=#0B1324;fontSize=14;spacing=10;arcSize=12;" value="Manifest runner
bounded runs
pure/default/tocc/history/mixed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="210" x="890" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eoh" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#16845B;fontColor=#0B1324;fontSize=14;spacing=10;arcSize=12;" value="Official EOH run
LLM code generation
evaluator + guard" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="210" x="890" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="corpus" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#94A3B8;fontColor=#0B1324;fontSize=14;spacing=10;arcSize=12;" value="Operator-card corpus
literature cards
history cards
API rules" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="115" width="200" x="1205" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="synthesis" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#94A3B8;fontColor=#0B1324;fontSize=14;spacing=10;arcSize=12;" value="Card memory
best_code -> features
-> history_* card" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="200" x="1205" y="415" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="audit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#B42318;fontColor=#0B1324;fontSize=14;spacing=10;arcSize=12;" value="Prior audit
block, split, deprioritize, watchlist" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="200" x="1205" y="585" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#CBD5E1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=13;spacing=8;arcSize=8;" value="Legend: blue = observed evidence, orange = TOCC control, green = bounded execution, gray = memory, red = prior-risk gate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="1040" x="70" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="run_trace" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="diagnose"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="diagnose" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="select_cards"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="select_cards" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="gatekeeper"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="gatekeeper" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="manifest"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="manifest" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="eoh"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="eoh" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="summary"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="summary" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#64748B;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;" target="synthesis" value="best code"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="synthesis" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#64748B;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;" target="corpus" value="new history card"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="corpus" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#B45309;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#B45309;fontSize=12;" target="select_cards" value="cards + decisions"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="audit" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#B42318;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#B42318;fontSize=12;" target="gatekeeper" value="prior policy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="summary" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=12;" target="run_trace"
